title: The TCC (Try-Confirm-Cancel) Pattern
description: Master the Try-Confirm-Cancel (TCC) pattern for managing distributed transactions. Implement resource-level reservations using TCC to achieve atomic-like behavior in distributed systems while avoiding the overhead of Two-Phase Commit.
objectives: Master the Try-Confirm-Cancel (TCC) pattern for managing distributed transactions.
Implement resource-level reservations using TCC to achieve atomic-like behavior in distributed systems while avoiding the overhead of Two-Phase Commit.
